1: Why Why doth thine anger smoke against the sheep of thy pasture?
2: This mount Zion, wherein thou hast dwelt.
3: hath done wickedly in the sanctuary.
4: They set up their ensigns for for signs.
5: A man A man was famous according as he had lifted up axes upon the thick trees.
6: Thereof at once with axes and hammers.
7: They have defiled by casting down by casting down the dwelling place of thy name to the ground.
8: They have burned up all the synagogues of God in the land.
9: Neither is there is there among us any that knoweth how long.
10: Shall the enemy blaspheme thy name for ever?
11: Pluck it it out of thy bosom.
12: Working salvation in the midst of the earth.
13: Thou brakest the heads of the dragons in the waters.
14: And And gavest him to be to be meat to the people inhabiting the wilderness.
16: Thou hast prepared the light and the sun.
17: Thou hast made summer and winter.
18: And that that the foolish people have blasphemed thy name.
19: Forget not the congregation of thy poor for ever.
20: For the dark places of the earth are full of the habitations of cruelty.
21: Let the poor and needy praise thy name.
22: Remember how the foolish man reproacheth thee daily.
23: The tumult of those that rise up against thee increaseth continually.
